song.title: Change My Heart, O God
song.author: Eddie Espinosa
song.lyrics:
[V1] .Cmaj7 Em7 Dm7 Change my heart, O God. .G C Make it ever true. .Cmaj7 Em7 Dm7 F/G Change my heart, O God. . G C May I be like You.
[C] .Esus E Am You are the potter, .Dm7 G C I am the clay. .Esus E Am Am/G Mold me and make me, .D G This is what I pray.
